xs : List a
ih :

    List.map (Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a)
      (List.scanl (@flip a (Chapter3.SymList a) (Chapter3.SymList a) (Chapter3.SymList.snocSL a))
        (Chapter3.SymList.nil a) xs)
⊢ List.map reverse (xs.reverse ++ [x]).tails =
    (List.map (Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a)
          (List.scanl (@flip a (Chapter3.SymList a) (Chapter3.SymList a) (Chapter3.SymList.snocSL a))
            (Chapter3.SymList.snocSL a x (Chapter3.SymList.nil a)) xs)).reverse ++
      [Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a (Chapter3.SymList.nil a)]

rw [tails_append_singleton]
    simp only [List.map_append, List.map_map, Function.comp, List.reverse_append, List.reverse_singleton, List.singleton_append]
    rw [← List.reverse_reverse (List.map reverse xs.reverse.tails), ih]
    simp only [map_reverse, List.map_map, Function.comp]
    congr 1
    · apply congrArg
      rw [← List.map_map]
      apply congrArg
      have h_step : ∀ (ys : List a) s1 s2, SymList.fromSL s2 = x :: SymList.fromSL s1 →
        List.map (List.cons x ∘ SymList.fromSL) (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) s1 ys) =
        List.map SymList.fromSL (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) s2 ys) := by
        intro ys
        induction ys with
        | nil => intros; simp [*]
        | cons z zs ih_ys =>
          intros s1 s2 h
          simp only [List.scanl, List.map_cons]
          constructor
          · exact h
          · apply ih_ys
            simp [fromSL_snoc, h]
      apply h_step
      simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil, SymList.snocSL]
    · simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil]

rw [tails_append_singleton, List.map_append, List.map_map]
    simp only [List.map_singleton]
    have h_scan : ∀ st, List.map SymList.fromSL (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) st xs) =
       List.map (SymList.fromSL st ++ ·) (List.map SymList.fromSL (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) SymList.nil xs)) := by
      intro st
      induction xs generalizing st with
      | nil => simp
      | cons y ys ihy =>
        simp [scanl_cons, fromSL_snoc]
        rw [ihy (SymList.snocSL y st), ihy (SymList.snocSL y SymList.nil)]
        simp [List.map_map, fromSL_snoc, SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil]
        apply List.map_congr
        intro l _
        simp [List.append_assoc]
    rw [h_scan (SymList.snocSL x SymList.nil)]
    rw [← ih]
    simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil, SymList.snocSL]
    rw [map_reverse, List.reverse_reverse, List.map_map]
    apply List.map_congr
    intro l _
    simp

rw [tails_append_singleton, List.map_append]
    simp only [List.map_map, List.reverse_append, List.reverse_singleton, List.nil_append, List.singleton_append]
    have h_hom (sl) : (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) sl xs).map SymList.fromSL =
        List.scanl (fun acc z => acc ++ [z]) (SymList.fromSL sl) xs := by
      induction xs generalizing sl <;> simp [*, fromSL_snoc]
    have h_cons (l) : (List.scanl (fun acc z => acc ++ [z]) l xs).map (x :: ·) =
        List.scanl (fun acc z => acc ++ [z]) (x :: l) xs := by
      induction xs generalizing l <;> simp [*, List.cons_append]
    rw [h_hom, h_hom]
    simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil, SymList.snocSL]
    rw [← h_cons, ← List.map_reverse, ← ih]
    simp [List.map_map]

rw [← snoc, map_reverse_tails_snoc, List.map_map]
    rw [← List.reverse_reverse (List.map reverse xs.reverse.tails), ih]
    rw [map_reverse, List.map_map]
    congr 1
    · rw [List.reverse_inj]
      have scan_lemma : ∀ (ys : List a) (q q' : SymList a),
          SymList.fromSL q' = x :: SymList.fromSL q →
          (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) q' ys).map SymList.fromSL =
          (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) q ys).map (cons x ∘ SymList.fromSL) := by
        intro ys
        induction ys with
        | nil => simp
        | cons y ys ih =>
          intro q q' h
          simp [scanl_cons]
          constructor
          · exact h
          · apply ih
            simp [fromSL_snoc, h]
      apply scan_lemma
      simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.snocSL, SymList.nil]
    · simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil]

rw [tails_append_singleton]
    simp [List.map_append, List.map_map, List.reverse_append]
    have h_scan : ∀ (ys : List a) (s1 s2 : SymList a),
        SymList.fromSL s1 = x :: SymList.fromSL s2 →
        List.map SymList.fromSL (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) s1 ys) =
        List.map (fun s => x :: SymList.fromSL s) (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) s2 ys) := by
      intro ys
      induction ys with
      | nil =>
        intro s1 s2 h
        simp [h]
      | cons y ys ih =>
        intro s1 s2 h
        simp [scanl_cons, fromSL_snoc, h]
        apply ih
        simp [fromSL_snoc, h]
    rw [h_scan xs (SymList.snocSL x SymList.nil) SymList.nil]
    · rw [List.map_reverse]
      rw [← List.map_map]
      rw [← ih]
      simp [List.map_reverse]
    · simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.snocSL, SymList.nil]

rw [tails_append_singleton, List.map_append]
    simp only [List.map_map, Function.comp, List.map_reverse]
    have : List.map (fun ys => x :: ys.reverse) xs.reverse.tails =
           (List.map (x :: ·) (List.map SymList.fromSL
             (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) SymList.nil xs))).reverse := by
      rw [← List.map_reverse, ← ih, List.map_map]; rfl
    rw [this]; congr 1; apply congrArg
    let op' (l : List a) (z : a) := l ++ [z]
    have scan_hom (s : SymList a) (l : List a) :
      (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) s l).map SymList.fromSL =
      List.scanl op' (SymList.fromSL s) l := by
      induction l generalizing s <;> simp [List.scanl, fromSL_snoc, *]
    have scan_shift (l : List a) (q : List a) :
      List.scanl op' (x :: q) l = (List.scanl op' q l).map (x :: ·) := by
      induction l generalizing q <;> simp [List.scanl, *]
    simp only [scan_hom, SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil, SymList.snocSL,
               List.nil_append, List.append_nil]
    rw [← scan_shift]
    congr
    simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.snocSL, SymList.nil]

rw [map_reverse_tails_snoc]
    congr 1
    · rw [← List.map_map, ← List.reverse_reverse (List.map reverse _), ih]
      rw [map_reverse, List.reverse_inj, List.map_map]
      have h_scan : ∀ l s s', SymList.fromSL s' = x :: SymList.fromSL s →
          List.map SymList.fromSL (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) s' l) =
          List.map (cons x ∘ SymList.fromSL) (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) s l) := by
        intro l; induction l with
        | nil => simp
        | cons y ys ih =>
          intro s s' h
          simp [scanl_cons]
          constructor
          · exact h
          · apply ih; simp [flip, fromSL_snoc, h]
      apply h_scan; simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.snocSL]
    · simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil]

rw [map_reverse_tails_snoc]
    have h_scan : ∀ (s1 s2 : SymList a),
        SymList.fromSL s2 = x :: SymList.fromSL s1 →
        List.map SymList.fromSL (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) s2 xs) =
          List.map (List.cons x ∘ SymList.fromSL) (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) s1 xs) := by
      intro s1 s2 h
      induction xs generalizing s1 s2 with
      | nil => simp [List.scanl, h]
      | cons y ys ih_xs =>
        simp [List.scanl, h]
        apply ih_xs
        simp [fromSL_snoc, h]
    rw [h_scan SymList.nil (SymList.snocSL x SymList.nil)]
    · rw [← List.map_map]
      rw [← ih]
      simp [map_reverse]
    · simp [fromSL_snoc, SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil]

rw [tails_append_singleton, List.map_append, List.map_map, List.map_cons]
    simp only [Function.comp]
    conv in (List.map (fun x_1 => reverse (x_1 ++ [x])) _) =>
      enter [2, _]
      simp
    rw [← List.map_map (g := cons x), ← List.reverse_eq_iff] at ih
    rw [ih, List.map_reverse]
    congr 1
    · apply Eq.symm
      generalize h : SymList.nil (a := a) = s1
      generalize SymList.snocSL x s1 = s2
      have : SymList.fromSL s2 = x :: SymList.fromSL s1 := by
        subst h; simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.snocSL, SymList.nil]
      clear h
      induction xs generalizing s1 s2 with
      | nil => simp [List.scanl, *]
      | cons y ys ind =>
        simp [List.scanl, flip]
        constructor
        · exact this
        · apply ind
          simp [fromSL_snoc, this]
    · simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil]

rw [tails_append_singleton, List.map_append]
    simp only [List.map_map]
    have : SymList.fromSL SymList.nil = [] := by simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil]
    rw [this]
    congr 1
    · rw [←List.map_map (List.cons x) List.reverse]
      have h : List.map List.reverse xs.reverse.tails = (List.map SymList.fromSL (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) SymList.nil xs)).reverse := by
        rw [←ih]; simp
      rw [h, List.map_reverse, List.map_map]
      congr 1
      have h1 : ∀ st, List.map SymList.fromSL (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) st xs) =
                      List.scanl (fun l y => l ++ [y]) (SymList.fromSL st) xs := by
        intro st; induction xs generalizing st <;> simp [List.scanl, flip, fromSL_snoc, *]
      rw [h1, h1]
      simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil, fromSL_snoc]
      generalize [] = l
      induction xs generalizing l <;> simp [List.scanl, List.cons_append, *]
